name: @finch.app/ext-ocr
description: OCR extension powered by PP-OCRv6 — extract Chinese and English text from images using Python PaddleOCR.

finch.name: PP-OCRv6
finch.description: Extract text from images and scanned PDFs using PP-OCRv6 via Python PaddleOCR — optimized for Chinese and English text.
finch.systemPrompt: When the user shares an image, pastes a screenshot, or asks to extract text from an image, call the ocr_image tool with the image file path. When the user shares a PDF file or asks to extract text from a PDF (especially a scanned PDF without selectable text), call the ocr_pdf tool with the PDF file path. Both tools handle setup automatically on first use.

promptGuides.title: Set up OCR
promptGuides.description: Download PP-OCRv6 models and configure OCR.
promptGuides.prompt: Set up OCR, download models and start OCR service

promptGuides.title: Extract text from image
promptGuides.description: Recognize text in an image using PP-OCRv6.

promptGuides.title: Extract text from PDF
promptGuides.description: OCR a scanned PDF to extract text page by page.
